strategy.name: E2 Swing Ensemble — Donchian-GC Trend + Hybrid Mean-Rev
strategy.description: Two-leg ensemble on 6h candles. Leg A (70%) follows Donchian-20 breakouts in golden cross. Leg B (30%) buys RSI-oversold dips in death cross or GC pullbacks. Each leg compounds independently — trade size = 50% of leg equity.

A.name: Donchian-GC Trend
A.entry: Last completed 6h close > 20-bar Donchian high AND EMA50 > EMA200 (golden cross) AND close > EMA50
A.exit: Last completed 6h close < 10-bar Donchian low  OR  live price >= entry + 5×ATR(14)
A.sizing: 50% of Leg A current equity (cash + open positions MTM) — compounds automatically

B.name: Hybrid Mean-Reversion Contrarian
B.entry_death_cross: EMA50 < EMA200 AND RSI(14) ≤ 30  — contrarian death-cross dip-buy
B.entry_golden_cross: EMA50 > EMA200 AND close < EMA50 AND RSI(14) ≤ 45  — GC pullback re-entry
B.sizing: 50% of Leg B current equity (cash + open positions MTM) — compounds automatically

indicators.EMA50: Exponential moving average of last 50 completed 6h closes (~12.5 days). Trend filter and pullback reference.
indicators.EMA200: Exponential moving average of last 200 completed 6h closes (~50 days). Regime baseline.
indicators.RSI_14: RSI over 14 periods on 6h closes. ≤30 = oversold (Leg B death-cross entry). ≤45 = pullback (Leg B GC entry).
indicators.ATR_14: Average True Range over 14 completed 6h candles. Used to size take-profit: entry + 5×ATR.
indicators.Donchian_20: Highest high of the 20 completed 6h bars before the current bar. Leg A breakout trigger.
indicators.Donchian_10: Lowest low of the 10 completed 6h bars before the current bar. Leg A trailing exit.

regime.golden_cross: EMA50 > EMA200 — uptrend confirmed. Leg A looks for Donchian breakouts. Leg B looks for pullbacks (RSI ≤ 45 below EMA50).
regime.death_cross: EMA50 < EMA200 — downtrend confirmed. Leg A dormant (no breakout entries). Leg B looks for oversold bounces (RSI ≤ 30).

risk_management.stop_loss: None — Donchian-10 low acts as trailing exit for Leg A. Leg B exits only on TP.
risk_management.compounding: Trade size = 50% of leg equity. As profits accumulate, trade sizes grow proportionally.
risk_management.fees: 0.60% Coinbase taker fee baked into backtest. Round-trip cost ~1.2% per trade.

scan_schedule.full_scan: Every 6 hours — fetches candle data, checks exits + entries
scan_schedule.quick_exit: Every 1 hour — checks live prices against stored TP levels (catches intrabar TP hits)
